div1.entryFree: Compáct, subst. (only in H6A cómpact), contract, accord: patience once more, whiles our c. is urged, As V, 4, 5. all the ceremony of this c. sealed in my function, Tw. V, 163. take this c. of a truce, H6A V, 4, 163. the c. is firm and true in me, R3 II, 2, 133. but what c. mean you to have with us? Caes. III, 1, 215. who, by a sealed c., did forfeit all his lands, Hml. I, 1, 86. In an ill sense, == plot, confederacy: what is the course and drift of your c.? Err. II, 2, 163.
